$schema: KAMA (Kaufman Adaptive MA) golden values. period=10, fast=2, slow=30.
$source: Hand-derived for constantPrice — ER = 0/0 → 0 → SC = slowSC^2; but seed is close[period-1]=100, then KAMA(t) = 100 + SC*(100-100) = 100 ∀ t≥period-1.
$note: pureUptrend/spike golden deferred to pandas-ta gen-golden.py; property tests cover the rest.
